languages.original_text: "Death walks beside the new priest in the crimson robe, I can feel it. The word of the Undying One has touched his ears as it touched mine. But has it been heard?"

languages.text: "Рядом с новым жрецом в алой робе ходит смерть, я чувствую это. Слово Неумирающего касалось его слуха, как коснулось моего. Но было ли оно услышано?"
"Death walks beside the new priest in the crimson robe, I can feel it. The word of the Undying One has touched his ears as it touched mine. But has it been heard?"

"Death walks beside the new priest in the crimson robe, I can feel it. The word of the Undying One has touched his ears as it touched mine. But has it been heard?"
"Death walks beside the new priest in the crimson robe, I can feel it. The word of the Undying One has touched his ears as it touched mine. But has it been heard?"

languages.text: 「赤い衣をまとい、新任の司祭は死と隣り合わせだ。その気配は感じられる。不死の者の言葉は、私の耳に、彼の耳にも届いた。だが、それは耳に届いたのだろうか」
languages.original_text: "Death walks beside the new priest in the crimson robe, I can feel it. The word of the Undying One has touched his ears as it touched mine. But has it been heard?"

traits.locale_text: 「赤い衣をまとい、新任の司祭は死と隣り合わせだ。その気配は感じられる。不死の者の言葉は、私の耳に、彼の耳にも届いた。だが、それは耳に届いたのだろうか」

languages.text: « La mort marche aux côtés du nouveau prêtre en robe rouge, je le sens. La parole de l'Immortel a touché ses oreilles comme les miennes, mais a-t-elle été entendue ? »
languages.original_text: "Death walks beside the new priest in the crimson robe, I can feel it. The word of the Undying One has touched his ears as it touched mine. But has it been heard?"

traits.locale_text: « La mort marche aux côtés du nouveau prêtre en robe rouge, je le sens. La parole de l'Immortel a touché ses oreilles comme les miennes, mais a-t-elle été entendue ? »

languages.text: "Der Tod begleitet den neuen Priester mit der roten Robe, das kann ich spüren. Das Wort des Todlosen hat seine Ohren ebenso berührt wie die meinen. Aber hat er es gehört?"
languages.original_text: "Death walks beside the new priest in the crimson robe, I can feel it. The word of the Undying One has touched his ears as it touched mine. But has it been heard?"

traits.locale_text: "Der Tod begleitet den neuen Priester mit der roten Robe, das kann ich spüren. Das Wort des Todlosen hat seine Ohren ebenso berührt wie die meinen. Aber hat er es gehört?"

languages.text: "Ölüm, kızıl cübbeli yeni rahibin yanında yürüyor. Hissedebiliyorum. Ölmeyen'in kelamı benimkine dokunduğu gibi onun kulaklarına da dokunmuş. Peki kelam duyuldu mu?"
languages.original_text: "Death walks beside the new priest in the crimson robe, I can feel it. The word of the Undying One has touched his ears as it touched mine. But has it been heard?"

traits.locale_text: "Ölüm, kızıl cübbeli yeni rahibin yanında yürüyor. Hissedebiliyorum. Ölmeyen'in kelamı benimkine dokunduğu gibi onun kulaklarına da dokunmuş. Peki kelam duyuldu mu?"

languages.text: «Puedo sentir que la muerte camina junto al nuevo sacerdote de túnica escarlata. La palabra del Inmortal ha llegado a sus oídos como hizo a los míos. ¿Pero acaso ha sido escuchada?».
languages.original_text: "Death walks beside the new priest in the crimson robe, I can feel it. The word of the Undying One has touched his ears as it touched mine. But has it been heard?"

traits.locale_text: «Puedo sentir que la muerte camina junto al nuevo sacerdote de túnica escarlata. La palabra del Inmortal ha llegado a sus oídos como hizo a los míos. ¿Pero acaso ha sido escuchada?».

languages.text: “我能感受到，死亡与那位新来的红衣神甫并肩而行。不死之神的话语曾拂过他的耳畔，如同拂过我的耳畔一般……可他听进去了吗？”
languages.original_text: "Death walks beside the new priest in the crimson robe, I can feel it. The word of the Undying One has touched his ears as it touched mine. But has it been heard?"

traits.locale_text: “我能感受到，死亡与那位新来的红衣神甫并肩而行。不死之神的话语曾拂过他的耳畔，如同拂过我的耳畔一般……可他听进去了吗？”
